repos.name: FitCheck
repos.description: Built FitCheck as a full-stack fashion-tech mobile application inspired by real consumer styling workflows. Users can upload outfit images, receive AI-generated feedback, manage their profile and style preferences, and interact with a production-style mobile experience built using React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, Supabase, and AI APIs.

repos.name: Aforro-React-Dashboard
repos.description: Production-grade Sales Analytics Dashboard built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, TanStack Table, and Recharts featuring responsive analytics UI, interactive charts, advanced data tables with search/sort/filter, reusable architecture, and polished SaaS-style UX.
